label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out how many penguins are less than 8 years old and weigh less than 12 kg. Let me start by going through each penguin one by one. First, the table has four penguins: Louis, Bernard, Vincent, and Gwen. Let me list their details again to make sure I have them right. Louis: age 7, height 50 cm, weight 11 kg. Bernard: age 5, height 80 cm, weight 13 kg. Vincent: age 9, height 60 cm, weight 11 kg. Gwen: age 8, height 70 cm, weight 15 kg. The question is looking for penguins that are both less than 8 years old AND weigh less than 12 kg. So both conditions have to be true for each penguin we count. Let me check each one. Starting with Louis. His age is 7, which is less than 8. His weight is 11 kg, which is less than 12. So Louis meets both conditions. That's one. Next is Bernard. Age is 5, which is less than 8. His weight is 13 kg. Wait, 13 is more than 12, so he doesn't meet the weight condition. So Bernard doesn't count. Even though he's young enough, his weight is over 12 kg. Then Vincent. Age is 9. Oh, 9 is more than 8, so he doesn't meet the age condition. Even though his weight is 11 kg, which is under 12, the age disqualifies him. So Vincent isn't counted. Gwen is next. Age is 8. The condition is less than 8, so 8 is not less than 8. So Gwen's age doesn't meet the requirement. Her weight is 15 kg, which is way over 12, so she doesn't count either. So, only Louis meets both conditions. Let me double-check to make sure I didn't miss anyone or make a mistake. Louis: 7 < 8 and 11 < 12 →
